pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version supporting Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may not support Java 21 language features or compilation correctly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace separate source and target compiler settings with the unified release flag for Java 9+.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' configuration options are deprecated in favor of 'release' for Java 9 and later; using them with Java 21 may cause warnings or incorrect module path handling.

spring-base-core/src/main/java/org/gy/fr.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 16+ serialization rules.
spring-base-core/src/main/java/org/gy/fr.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID must be annotated with @Serial in Java 16+ unless the class is a record or the annotation is present.
Compilation error: cannot find symbol class Serial.

spring-base-util/pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit dependency on jakarta.annotation-api to replace the removed javax.annotation module in Java 21.
spring-base-util/pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation package is no longer available in the JDK since Java 11, causing compile errors for code using annotations like @Generated or @Nullable if not provided by an external dependency.
